xml.message:
Changelog for Wunderland 2.00(3): *set news to off and dark theme to on by default
Changelog for Wunderland 2.00(2): *Fixed a typo causing Turkish to be the default language
Changelog for Wunderland 2.00(1): *Added Turkish translation
Changelog for Wunderland 2.00(0): *Initial release based on AppList source code *Supports all content types *The categories list is equal to server *Supports icons, addon files, UIDs, feed *Most references and strings are migrated to Wunderland *Icons are migrated *Unused settings entries are removed *UID and project name is changed *Widget appears to be working
